title: Quick Measure
description: Adds a simple client-side command that enables Ruler Mode, letting you calculate block-to-block distances right in-game.
body:
📏 Quick Measure – In-Game Ruler Tool

> Need to measure distances quickly and accurately without leaving Minecraft? Quick Measure adds a simple client-side command that enables Ruler Mode, letting you calculate block-to-block distances right in-game. Perfect for builders, redstone engineers, or anyone planning precise structures.

⚙️ Features

- Easy-to-use ```/ruler``` command to toggle Ruler Mode
  
- Instantly see the distance between two points in blocks
  
- Client-side only – works on any server without needing installation server-side

🧱 Ideal for architects, base planning, and large-scale builds.
